evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 7.6 to 8.0. Here's my CustomText regex code: before-8.0-regex.js and package_7.6.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps package versions to 8.0 in package.json and renames CustomText regex properties: pattern→valueRegex, dataTypePattern→anchorRegex, plus the plural variants.

evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.1 to 8.2 so I can react to manual field corrections. Here's my main script: before-8.2-validation-flow.js and package_8.1.json.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to ^8.2.0 and adds didSubmitManualInputForField to the existing validation flow listener. didCaptureLabelWithFields is preserved.

assertions.text: didSubmitManualInputForField is added to the validation flow listener

evals.prompt: Upgrade my Label Capture from 8.2 to 8.4. Here's my main script: before-8.4-validation-flow.js and package_8.2.json. I want fine-grained progress feedback as the validation flow accumulates partial results.
evals.expected_output: The skill bumps versions to ^8.4.0, adds didUpdateValidationFlowResult to the existing listener. didCaptureLabelWithFields and didSubmitManualInputForField are preserved.

assertions.text: didUpdateValidationFlowResult is added to the validation flow listener
didUpdateValidationFlowResult signature includes (type, asyncId, fields, getFrameData) parameters
No web-only renames (e.g. setValueRegex/setAnchorRegex/setPlaceholderTextForLabelDefinition swap of CustomText regex setters) are introduced
